hero.title: Doctor Visit Tracker
hero.description: Record doctor appointments, visit history, follow-ups, costs, and personal medical notes in a private organizer.

flow.title: Schedule -> Record -> Review
steps: Add a visit with doctor, specialty, clinic, date, and status
Record reason, notes, medications, follow-up, cost, and insurance details
Search and filter upcoming appointments or completed visit history
Review specialty, month, follow-up, and expense summaries

differences.title: A private organizer for medical appointments
differences.description: Doctor Visit Tracker keeps personal visit records organized without giving medical advice or treatment recommendations.

items.title: Doctor and specialty context
items.description: Use default or custom specialties to classify visits.

items.title: Appointment status
items.description: Track scheduled, completed, cancelled, missed, and archived visits.

items.title: Personal notes
items.description: Keep diagnosis notes, medications, insurance notes, and personal observations as user-entered records only.

feel.title: A calm record of appointments and history
feel.description: The workflow keeps upcoming appointments and recent visits easy to revisit.

items.title: Practical filters
items.description: Search by doctor, clinic, specialty, reason, notes, or status.

items.title: Follow-up visibility
items.description: Follow-up dates are shown in insights without becoming medical instructions.

items.title: Clear boundaries
items.description: The app is a personal organizer, not medical decision support.

audiences.title: Who uses Doctor Visit Tracker
audiences.description: Useful for people keeping personal appointment records for themselves or family members.

items.title: Individuals
items.description: Track upcoming visits and personal notes.

items.title: Families
items.description: Keep doctor, clinic, and visit history easier to find.

items.title: Care organizers
items.description: Review follow-ups, costs, and past appointment context.

items.title: Visits
items.description: Create, edit, archive, restore, and delete visit records.

items.title: Specialties
items.description: Use default specialties or add personal labels.

items.title: Insights
items.description: Review visits by specialty, month, status, upcoming follow-ups, and costs.

groupedSection.title: From appointment to history
groupedSection.description: Use one protected workflow for personal visit organization.

items.name: Scheduled visits
items.description: Track visit date, time, doctor, clinic, and status.

items.name: Follow-ups
items.description: See follow-up dates without medical advice claims.

technicalSection.title: Built for private personal records
technicalSection.description: Doctor Visit Tracker follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: API-driven overview metadata and generated API contracts.
No diagnosis, treatment recommendation, prescription, emergency support, or professional medical advice claims.

finalCta.title: Ready to organize doctor visits?
finalCta.description: Open the tracker and create the first visit record.
